name: Media Library
description: Eagle-compatible local media manager with folders, previews, stars, filters, Quick Look, and agent-ready controls.

capabilities.title: Filter media
capabilities.description: Change the visible media set by folder, media kind, star state, duration, or search text.
examples: Show only mp4 files longer than 3 minutes

codex.skill_hint: Use when Codex needs GeeAgent Media Library to focus its visible set without reading or writing user files.

capabilities.title: Focus folder
capabilities.description: Switch the media browser to a named folder or uncategorized view.

codex.skill_hint: Use when Codex needs GeeAgent Media Library to switch to a known folder or uncategorized view.

capabilities.title: Import local media files
capabilities.description: Import local image or video file paths into the authorized Eagle-compatible media library, restoring saved access when possible and returning imported item paths.
examples: Import these downloaded videos into the media library
Add these local media files to Media Library

codex.reason: Reads user-selected local files and writes library data; keep disabled until Codex approval and macOS authorization semantics are audited end to end.
